meaning: n.缝被子,被上缝花纹的缝法
examples: She does a lot of quilting.
Quilting a bed cover can be laborious.
The quilt has pretty, scalloped edges and intricate quilting.
But skeleton and weightlifting have about as much in common as quilting and auto repair, and that is what makes Ms. Uhlaender so unusual.
"It looks like a hi-tech version of quilting, " Mr. Kriemler says.
